# Security policy

## Supported versions

| Version | Supported |
|---|---|
| Latest stable (WordPress.org directory) | Yes |
| All prior versions | No |

Quillwork is a WordPress theme. It ships no server-side PHP beyond standard WordPress hooks and no front-end JavaScript. The attack surface is narrow, but reports are taken seriously.

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Report privately via GitHub's built-in private vulnerability reporting:
[Report a vulnerability](../../security/advisories/new)

Or email **hello@thisismyurl.com** with the subject line `[Quillwork] Security`.

You will receive an acknowledgement within 72 hours. There is no bug-bounty program, but responsible disclosures are credited in release notes (with your permission).

## Scope

- Theme code in this repository
- Block patterns and templates shipped with the theme

Out of scope: vulnerabilities in WordPress core, third-party plugins, or the hosting environment.
